name: Chunk 1/102
text:
# FirstUK Bank — Departments & Functions  
## Metadata  
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Document ID | DEPT-2026-001 |
| Version | 2.2 |
| Effective Date | 2026-01-15 |
| Review Date | 2027-01-15 |
| Owner | Chief Operating Officer |
| Department | Operations |
| Status | Active |
| Classification | Internal |
| Audience | All Staff, Department Heads |
| Related Documents | [[organisation_model]], [[systems]] |  
---

name: Chunk 2/102
text:
## Executive Summary  
FirstUK Bank organizes around 12 core departments, each with defined roles, responsibilities, and interfaces. This document provides the organizational blueprint for departmental functions, reporting lines, and cross-functional collaboration.  
---

name: Chunk 3/102
text:
## 1. Retail Banking Department  
**Department Head:** Director of Retail Banking
**Reports to:** CEO
**Headcount:** 8
**Key Locations:** Head Office (3), Branches (5)

name: Chunk 4/102
text:
### Mission  
Deliver consumer banking products and services, drive customer acquisition, and maximize customer lifetime value.

name: Chunk 5/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Sales & Onboarding
- Customer acquisition campaigns
- Account opening support
- Digital onboarding (online, mobile)
- Branch-based sales  
**Manager:** Manager of Sales & Onboarding

name: Chunk 6/102
text:
#### Customer Service & Retention
- Frontline support (phone, email, chat, branch)
- Complaint resolution (first line)
- Customer retention programs
- Service quality assurance  
**Manager:** Manager of Customer Service

name: Chunk 7/102
text:
#### Branch Operations
- Daily branch operations management
- Cash handling and reconciliation
- Customer meeting facilitation
- Local marketing  
**Location Manager:** At each branch (see [[branches]])

name: Chunk 8/102
text:
### Key Metrics & SLAs  
| Metric | Target | Actual |
|--------|--------|--------|
| New Account Activation | 48 hours | 38 hours |
| Customer Satisfaction (NPS) | 70+ | 72 |
| First-Call Resolution | 85% | 81% |
| Branch Availability | 99.5% | 99.7% |
| Account Opening Error Rate | <0.5% | 0.3% |

name: Chunk 9/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Product Management:** Product feature requests, feedback
- **Technology:** Online banking issues, app bugs
- **Compliance:** Customer due diligence, KYC
- **Risk:** Fraud detection, credit assessment
- **Operations:** Settlement, reconciliation
- **Customer Service:** Complaint escalation  
---

name: Chunk 10/102
text:
## 2. Product Management Department  
**Department Head:** Director of Product Management
**Reports to:** CEO
**Headcount:** 4
**Location:** Head Office

name: Chunk 11/102
text:
### Mission  
Define product strategy, manage product lifecycle, and ensure product-market fit.

name: Chunk 12/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Product Strategy & Development
- Product roadmap planning
- Feature prioritization
- Competitive analysis
- Market research  
**Manager:** Senior Product Manager

name: Chunk 13/102
text:
#### Product Operations
- Product documentation (see [[products]])
- Pricing management (see [[products]])
- Feature specifications
- Product launch coordination  
**Manager:** Product Operations Manager

name: Chunk 14/102
text:
### Key Responsibilities  
- Develop product specifications (reviewed by Risk & Compliance)
- Manage Interest Rate Schedule (IRS-2026-001)
- Maintain Product FAQ (PROD-FAQ-001)
- Coordinate with Technology for implementation
- Monitor product performance and KPIs
- Manage customer feedback and product requests

name: Chunk 15/102
text:
### Key Metrics  
| Product | Accounts | Growth | NPS |
|---------|----------|--------|-----|
| SmartSaver Account | 650 | 8% QoQ | 72 |
| SmartSaver Plus | 150 | 12% QoQ | 78 |
| Current Account | 450 | 5% QoQ | 68 |
| Mortgage | 45 | 10% QoQ | 70 |
| Debit Card | 800 | 3% QoQ | 74 |

name: Chunk 16/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Retail Banking:** Customer insights, sales enablement
- **Technology:** Product requirements, technical feasibility
- **Risk & Compliance:** Regulatory requirements, risk assessment
- **Marketing:** Product messaging, campaign support
- **Legal:** Terms & Conditions, regulatory compliance
- **Finance:** Pricing, profitability analysis

name: Chunk 17/102
text:
### Product Committee (see [[organisation_model]])  
**Frequency:** Bi-weekly
**Chair:** Director of Product Management
**Members:** Product Management, Retail Banking, Risk, Compliance, Technology
**Agenda:** Feature prioritization, product launches, competitive analysis  
---

name: Chunk 18/102
text:
## 3. Operations Department  
**Department Head:** Chief Operating Officer (also Head of Operations)
**Reports to:** Board of Directors
**Headcount:** 5
**Location:** Head Office (3), Branches (2)

name: Chunk 19/102
text:
### Mission  
Ensure efficient, accurate, and compliant execution of banking operations.

name: Chunk 20/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Account Services
- Account opening processing
- Account closure processing
- Standing order setup
- Direct debit management
- Account maintenance  
**Manager:** Account Services Manager

name: Chunk 21/102
text:
#### Settlement & Reconciliation
- Daily transaction settlement
- Cash reconciliation
- Interbank clearing (BACS, CHAPS, FPS)
- Failed transaction resolution  
**Manager:** Settlement Manager

name: Chunk 22/102
text:
#### Exception Handling
- Failed transactions
- Disputed transactions
- Regulatory exceptions
- Customer complaints (operational)  
**Manager:** Exception Handler

name: Chunk 23/102
text:
### Standard Operating Procedures  
Key SOPs managed by Operations:  
| SOP ID | Title | Owner |
|--------|-------|-------|
| ACCT-OPEN-SOP-001 | Account Opening | Account Services Manager |
| ACCT-CLOSE-SOP-001 | Account Closure | Account Services Manager |
| DORM-SOP-001 | Dormancy Management | Account Services Manager |
| SETL-SOP-001 | Settlement Process | Settlement Manager |
| EXCP-SOP-001 | Exception Handling | Exception Handler |
| ESCL-MATRIX-001 | Escalation Matrix | COO |

name: Chunk 24/102
text:
### Key Metrics  
| Metric | Target | Actual |
|--------|--------|--------|
| Account Opening SLA (1–2 days) | 95% | 98% |
| Settlement Accuracy | 99.9% | 99.95% |
| Reconciliation Completion | Daily EOD | 22:30 |
| Exception Resolution | <3 days | 2.1 days |

name: Chunk 25/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Retail Banking:** Account opening, customer inquiries
- **Technology:** System downtime, data issues
- **Compliance:** Regulatory reporting, audit support
- **Risk:** Fraud detection, exception review
- **Finance:** Reconciliation, financial reporting
- **Customer Service:** Complaint support  
---

name: Chunk 26/102
text:
## 4. Customer Service Department  
**Department Head:** Manager of Customer Service
**Reports to:** Director of Retail Banking
**Headcount:** 3
**Location:** Head Office (2), Branches (1)

name: Chunk 27/102
text:
### Mission  
Deliver responsive, empathetic customer support and resolve complaints efficiently.

name: Chunk 28/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Multi-Channel Support
- Phone support (0800-555-2265)
- Email support (support@firstuk.bank)
- Online chat support
- Branch support
- Social media monitoring  
**Hours:** Monday–Friday 08:00–20:00, Saturday 09:00–17:00

name: Chunk 29/102
text:
#### Complaint Resolution  
**Process:**
1. First-line resolution (Retail Banking or Customer Service)
2. Escalation to Manager (3-day SLA)
3. Escalation to Director (5-day SLA)
4. External FCA complaint (8-week deadline)  
**See:** Complaint Handling Policy (COM-POL-006)

name: Chunk 30/102
text:
#### Customer Retention
- Win-back campaigns for closed accounts
- Loyalty programs
- Proactive outreach
- Feedback collection

name: Chunk 31/102
text:
### Call Centre Scripting  
**Document:** Call Centre Script (CSC-001)
**Contains:** Scripts for common inquiries, account opening, complaints, retention

name: Chunk 32/102
text:
### Support Templates  
- Email Templates (ETML-001)
- SMS Templates (STML-001)
- Response Templates for common queries

name: Chunk 33/102
text:
### Key Metrics  
| Metric | Target | Actual |
|--------|--------|--------|
| Average Response Time (email) | 24 hours | 18 hours |
| Phone Answer Rate (1st call) | 85% | 82% |
| Customer Satisfaction | 85% | 88% |
| Complaint Closure | 8 weeks (FCA) | 6 weeks avg |
| Hold Time (phone) | <5 min | 4.2 min |

name: Chunk 34/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Retail Banking:** Complaint support, escalation
- **Compliance:** Complaint reporting, regulatory metrics
- **Operations:** Account inquiry support
- **Product Management:** Feature requests, feedback  
---

name: Chunk 35/102
text:
## 5. Financial Crime Department  
**Department Head:** Head of Financial Crime
**Reports to:** Chief Risk Officer
**Headcount:** 2
**Location:** Head Office

name: Chunk 36/102
text:
### Mission  
Detect, prevent, and report financial crime, including money laundering, fraud, and sanctions violations.

name: Chunk 37/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### AML/KYC Compliance
- Customer Due Diligence (CDD) — initial verification at account opening
- Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) — for higher-risk customers
- Ongoing Monitoring — transaction pattern analysis
- Customer Screening — sanctions list, PEP screening  
**See:** AML Policy (AML-POL-002), KYC SOP (KYC-SOP-001)

name: Chunk 38/102
text:
#### Suspicious Activity Reporting
- Transaction monitoring (automated)
- Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) to NCA
- Regulatory reporting

name: Chunk 39/102
text:
#### Fraud Prevention
- Fraud detection rules (rules engine in [[systems]])
- Card fraud monitoring
- Account takeover prevention
- Customer authentication reviews  
**See:** Fraud Policy (FRAUD-POL-007)

name: Chunk 40/102
text:
### Key Metrics  
| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Customers Screened (monthly) | 50 |
| High-Risk Alerts | 5–10 per month |
| SARs Filed (annual) | 8–12 |
| Fraud Claims (monthly) | 2–3 |
| Fraud Prevention Rate | 97%+ |

name: Chunk 41/102
text:
### Regulatory Requirements  
- FCA COBS Part 10 (Anti-money laundering)
- Proceeds of Crime Act 2002 (POCA)
- Terrorism Act 2000
- GDPR (data handling)

name: Chunk 42/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Retail Banking:** Customer onboarding, due diligence
- **Compliance:** Regulatory reporting, audit support
- **Operations:** Transaction review, exception handling
- **Technology:** Fraud detection systems, monitoring tools  
---

name: Chunk 43/102
text:
## 6. Compliance Department  
**Department Head:** Head of Compliance
**Reports to:** Chief Risk Officer
**Headcount:** 2
**Location:** Head Office

name: Chunk 44/102
text:
### Mission  
Ensure adherence to regulatory requirements and internal policies.

name: Chunk 45/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Regulatory Monitoring
- Regulatory updates and circulars
- Compliance calendar management
- New regulation implementation
- Regulatory reporting to FCA/PRA  
**Document:** Regulatory Circulars (REG-CIRC-2026)

name: Chunk 46/102
text:
#### Policy Management
- Policy development and review
- Policy approval (via Compliance Committee)
- Policy communication and training
- Policy effectiveness testing  
**Core Policies:**
- Customer Identification Policy (CID-POL-001)
- AML Policy (AML-POL-002)
- Privacy Policy (PRI-POL-004)
- Operational Risk Policy (ORP-POL-003)
- Document Retention Policy (RET-POL-005)
- Complaint Handling Policy (COM-POL-006)

name: Chunk 47/102
text:
#### Internal Controls
- Control testing
- Control design review
- Audit support
- Control effectiveness monitoring

name: Chunk 48/102
text:
### Compliance Committee (see [[organisation_model]])  
**Frequency:** Monthly
**Chair:** Head of Compliance
**Members:** Compliance, Risk, Financial Crime, Legal, Retail Banking (as needed)
**Agenda:** Regulatory updates, policy changes, control issues

name: Chunk 49/102
text:
### Key Metrics  
| Metric | Status |
|--------|--------|
| Policy Review Timeliness | 100% on schedule |
| Regulatory Reporting Accuracy | 100% |
| Audit Finding Resolution | 95% within SLA |
| Staff Compliance Training | 100% annual |

name: Chunk 50/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Risk & Compliance Committee:** Policy governance
- **Financial Crime:** AML/KYC policy updates
- **Operations:** Control testing support
- **Internal Audit:** Audit coordination
- **All Departments:** Regulatory training  
---

name: Chunk 51/102
text:
## 7. Risk Department  
**Department Head:** Chief Risk Officer
**Reports to:** Board of Directors
**Headcount:** 2
**Location:** Head Office

name: Chunk 52/102
text:
### Mission  
Identify, measure, and manage enterprise risks to protect the bank's capital and franchise.

name: Chunk 53/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Credit Risk Management
- Lending decisions (for mortgages)
- Credit scoring and assessment
- Loan monitoring
- Delinquency management

name: Chunk 54/102
text:
#### Operational Risk Management
- Risk assessment (processes, systems, people)
- Risk scenario analysis
- Loss data collection
- Operational risk KPIs

name: Chunk 55/102
text:
#### Market & Liquidity Risk
- Interest rate risk
- Liquidity management
- Treasury oversight

name: Chunk 56/102
text:
### Risk Assessment  
**Risk Categories:**
- Credit Risk (mortgages, overdrafts)
- Operational Risk (process failures, fraud)
- Compliance Risk (regulatory breaches)
- Reputational Risk (brand damage, complaints)
- Strategic Risk (business model changes)

name: Chunk 57/102
text:
### Key Risk Appetite  
| Risk Type | Appetite |
|-----------|----------|
| Credit Loss Ratio | <0.5% of loan book |
| Operational Loss | <£10k per annum |
| Regulatory Capital Ratio (Pillar 1) | >15% |
| Complaint Ratio | <2 per 1,000 accounts |

name: Chunk 58/102
text:
### Risk Committee (see [[organisation_model]])  
**Frequency:** Quarterly
**Chair:** Board Risk Committee Chair (independent director)
**Members:** Board directors, CRO, CFO, Compliance Head
**Agenda:** Risk appetite, capital strategy, risk metrics, audit findings

name: Chunk 59/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Product Management:** Product risk assessment
- **Retail Banking:** Customer credit decisions
- **Operations:** Process risk identification
- **Finance:** Capital management, stress testing
- **Internal Audit:** Risk and control testing  
---

name: Chunk 60/102
text:
## 8. Technology Department  
**Department Head:** Chief Technology Officer
**Reports to:** CEO
**Headcount:** 6
**Location:** Head Office

name: Chunk 61/102
text:
### Mission  
Provide secure, scalable, reliable technology infrastructure and systems.

name: Chunk 62/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Enterprise Architecture
- Technology strategy
- System design
- Integration architecture (see [[systems]])
- Technology roadmap  
**Manager:** Enterprise Architect

name: Chunk 63/102
text:
#### Application Development
- Product feature development
- System enhancements
- Bug fixes
- Deployment management  
**Manager:** Development Manager

name: Chunk 64/102
text:
#### Infrastructure & Operations
- System uptime and reliability
- Cloud infrastructure management
- Disaster recovery
- Performance optimization  
**Manager:** Infrastructure Manager

name: Chunk 65/102
text:
#### Information Security
- Security governance
- Vulnerability management
- Incident response
- Security training  
**Manager:** Security Officer

name: Chunk 66/102
text:
### Key Systems (see [[systems]])  
- Account Management System (AMS)
- Internet Banking Platform (IBP)
- Mobile Banking App
- Fraud Detection Engine
- Data Warehouse

name: Chunk 67/102
text:
### Service Level Agreements (SLAs)  
| Service | Availability | RTO | RPO |
|---------|--------------|-----|-----|
| Online Banking | 99.8% | 2 hours | 15 min |
| Mobile App | 99.5% | 4 hours | 1 hour |
| Branch Systems | 99.9% | 1 hour | 15 min |
| Payment Processing | 99.95% | 30 min | 5 min |

name: Chunk 68/102
text:
### Technology Governance  
- Architecture Review Board (weekly)
- Change Advisory Board (for production changes)
- Technology Risk Committee (quarterly, see [[organisation_model]])

name: Chunk 69/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Product Management:** Feature requirements
- **Retail Banking:** User support, training
- **Risk & Compliance:** Security requirements, compliance automation
- **Operations:** System availability, incident response  
---

name: Chunk 70/102
text:
## 9. Enterprise Architecture  
**Department Head:** Chief Technology Officer (dual role)
**Reports to:** CEO
**Headcount:** 1 (integrated with Technology)
**Location:** Head Office

name: Chunk 71/102
text:
### Mission  
Define technology strategy and ensure system alignment with business objectives.

name: Chunk 72/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Architecture Design
- System context diagrams (see [[systems]])
- Data flow diagrams
- Technology standards
- API design (see [[systems]])

name: Chunk 73/102
text:
#### Integration Management
- Integration patterns
- Data integration pipelines
- System-to-system interfaces
- Interoperability standards

name: Chunk 74/102
text:
#### Technology Roadmap
- 3-year technology strategy
- Tool and platform evaluations
- Technology upgrades
- Decommissioning plans

name: Chunk 75/102
text:
### Key Documents  
- Application Landscape (APP-LAND-001)
- Context Diagram (CTX-DIAG-001)
- Logical Data Model (LDM-001)
- API Catalogue (API-CAT-001)
- Integration Specification (INT-SPEC-001)  
**See:** [[systems]]

name: Chunk 76/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Technology:** Technical governance
- **Product Management:** Feature feasibility
- **Operations:** System design review
- **Risk & Compliance:** Architecture audit  
---

name: Chunk 77/102
text:
## 10. Marketing Department  
**Department Head:** Head of Marketing
**Reports to:** CEO
**Headcount:** 1
**Location:** Head Office

name: Chunk 78/102
text:
### Mission  
Build brand awareness, drive customer acquisition, and support product launches.

name: Chunk 79/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Brand & Communications
- Brand identity and messaging
- Website content
- Social media presence
- PR and media relations

name: Chunk 80/102
text:
#### Customer Acquisition
- Acquisition campaigns
- Channel optimization
- Partner marketing
- Conversion optimization

name: Chunk 81/102
text:
#### Product Launch Support
- Launch campaigns
- Collateral development
- Sales enablement
- Customer communications

name: Chunk 82/102
text:
### Key Campaigns  
| Campaign | Period | Channel | Target |
|----------|--------|---------|--------|
| SmartSaver Spring Refresh | Mar–May 2026 | Digital, Branch | 50 new accounts |
| Current Account Bundle | Jun–Aug 2026 | Email, Phone | Cross-sell |
| Mortgage Awareness | Sep–Nov 2026 | Digital, Events | 5 new mortgages |

name: Chunk 83/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Product Management:** Campaign support, product messaging
- **Retail Banking:** Sales support, channel coordination
- **Customer Service:** Retention campaigns
- **Compliance:** Marketing compliance review  
---

name: Chunk 84/102
text:
## 11. Legal Department  
**Department Head:** General Counsel
**Reports to:** CEO
**Headcount:** 1
**Location:** Head Office

name: Chunk 85/102
text:
### Mission  
Provide legal counsel and manage regulatory affairs.

name: Chunk 86/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Contract Management
- Terms & Conditions (T&Cs) development
- Legal document review
- Vendor contracts
- Partner agreements

name: Chunk 87/102
text:
#### Regulatory Affairs
- Regulatory engagement with FCA/PRA
- Regulatory circulars tracking
- Regulatory response support
- Legal compliance

name: Chunk 88/102
text:
#### Litigation & Dispute Resolution
- Customer disputes
- Legal claims management
- Settlement negotiations
- Expert witness coordination

name: Chunk 89/102
text:
### Key Legal Documents  
- Terms & Conditions (by product, see [[products]])
- Privacy Policy (PRI-POL-004)
- Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
- Vendor Agreements

name: Chunk 90/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Compliance:** Regulatory coordination
- **Risk & Compliance:** Policy legal review
- **Customer Service:** Dispute support
- **Operations:** Contract review  
---

name: Chunk 91/102
text:
## 12. Internal Audit  
**Department Head:** Head of Internal Audit
**Reports to:** Board Audit Committee (independent line)
**Headcount:** 1
**Location:** Head Office

name: Chunk 92/102
text:
### Mission  
Provide independent assurance on risk management and control effectiveness.

name: Chunk 93/102
text:
### Key Functions  
#### Control Testing
- Process walkthroughs
- Control effectiveness testing
- Control design reviews
- Audit procedures

name: Chunk 94/102
text:
#### Risk-Based Audit
- Annual audit plan (risk-based)
- Audit execution
- Finding and observation reporting
- Management response tracking

name: Chunk 95/102
text:
#### Audit Reporting
- Audit reports (quarterly)
- Finding tracking
- Audit Committee reporting
- Management letter

name: Chunk 96/102
text:
### Annual Audit Plan  
| Area | Frequency | Status |
|------|-----------|--------|
| Account Opening (KYC/AML) | Annual | Completed Q4 2025 |
| Payment Processing | Annual | In progress Q1 2026 |
| Fraud Detection Rules | Bi-annual | Scheduled Q2 2026 |
| IT General Controls | Annual | Completed Q1 2026 |
| Operational Risk | Annual | Scheduled Q3 2026 |

name: Chunk 97/102
text:
### Cross-Functional Interfaces  
- **Risk & Compliance:** Audit coordination
- **All Departments:** Audit fieldwork support
- **Board Audit Committee:** Audit reporting  
---

name: Chunk 98/102
text:
## Cross-Departmental Collaboration  
### Key Committees (see [[organisation_model]])  
1. **Executive Committee** — Weekly, strategic decisions
2. **Product Committee** — Bi-weekly, product governance
3. **Compliance Committee** — Monthly, regulatory updates
4. **Risk Committee** — Quarterly, enterprise risk oversight

name: Chunk 99/102
text:
### Communication Protocols  
**Escalation Matrix:** ESC-001
**Escalation Path:** Issue → Manager → Director → Executive Committee  
---

name: Chunk 100/102
text:

| Retail Banking | NPS | 70 | 72 |
| Product Management | New Feature Delivery | 4/quarter | 3/quarter |
| Operations | Account Opening SLA | 95% | 98% |

| Financial Crime | SAR Timeliness | <30 days | 20 days |
| Compliance | Policy Review Timeliness | 100% | 100% |
